product.type: <string: e.g., perfume bottle, mechanical keyboard, sports car>

materials_and_finish.primary: <string: e.g., matte black plastic, brushed aluminum>

staging.surface: <string: e.g., wet asphalt, mirrored glass, velvet podium>
